mapper.select: SELECT TT.TRAVEL_THEME_CD AS travelThemeCd , TT.TRAVEL_THEME_NM AS travelThemeNm , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAVEL_PLAN TP WHERE TP.TRAVEL_THEME_CD = TT.TRAVEL_THEME_CD) AS planCount FROM TRAVEL_THEME TT ORDER BY TT.TRAVEL_THEME_CD ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAVEL_THEME WHERE TRAVEL_THEME_CD = #{cd}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAVEL_PLAN WHERE TRAVEL_THEME_CD = #{cd}
